programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: With a crucial memory from Nina's past, Salim finally cracks the Alison Love murder — just as Noel, for once, steps up to support Cherril.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney S1
programme.desc: When JD's son is kidnapped by an international murder in exchange for a wanted criminal in NCIS custody, the team tries by all the way to get his son back safely without trading the criminal. A challenge will start to get JD's son safe and alive.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent – Series 18
programme.desc: Britain's Got Talent 2025, the 18th series, will feature Ant and Dec returning as hosts and Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon, and Bruno Tonioli as judges. The series will include a variety of acts vying for the chance to perform at the Royal Variety Performance and win a 250,000 prize.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral S8
programme.desc: From whirling tornadoes to torrential rains, to harrowing hurricanes, Weather Gone Viral gives viewers unprecedented access to some of the most insane meteorological moments from around the world. Featuring videos of the most extreme and destructive weather conditions, firsthand accounts, and professional meteorologists sharing tales from the front lines, viewers get to experience the fury of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr3
programme.desc: Go Jetters go bigger as our plucky international heroes Xuli, Kyan, Lars and Foz, together with their disco-grooving mentor Ubercorn, discover lots more about our world. And there's a good chance Grandmaster Glitch has got there first to cause his usual chaos!

programme.desc: In order to learn and master Terastallization, Liko, Roy, and Dot have joined the Naranja Academy's "Tera Training"! They meet Clavell, the school's director, and Geeta, the chairwoman of Paldea's Pokmon League as well as the Elite Four of Paldea: Rika, Poppy, Larry , and Hassel. And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.title: Busy Bodies
programme.desc: Itch Itch Itchy! Aidan and Evie get bitten by bugs, and they're suffering in agony! Med tries his best to be helpful...well, kind of. Plus - ever wondered why our skin turns purple after we bump into objects? Accident prone Aidan finds out the hard way after crashing indoors. With Bruce the bruise on his head, it's up to Med and Evie to find out the strange workings of how our skin does more than just look good...

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: A funny and frightening rollercoaster journey investigating our planet's most extreme weather as told and filmed by ordinary people caught in the eye of the storm'. We follow the incredible human stories of the families caught up in snowstorms, avalanches, floods, landslides, terrifying wildfires and too close for comfort lightning strikes. The film uses jaw dropping, often never-before-seen footage, captured on cameras and phones.

programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. programme.desc: Whale with Steve Backshall gives a stunning and comprehensive overview of the world of whales, dolphins and porpoises. Adventurer and conservationist Steve Backshall travels from the Azores to the Arctic, capturing breathtaking underwater footage in each unique habitat.

programme.title: News Tonight

programme.title: Evolution Earth
programme.desc: EVOLUTION EARTH embarks on a global expedition to reveal the extraordinary ways animals are keeping pace with a planet that is changing at superspeed. We meet the scientists, filmmakers and local communities at the front lines of this rapid change. They show that we too can help, and that if we work with nature in planned conservation efforts, nature can do more than survive - it can bounce back. .

programme.title: How to be a Latin Lover

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: 锦月如歌
programme.desc: 为保家族爵位何家长女何晏周也饰被迫戴上面具扮做何家嫡长子何如非少年时何晏于贤昌馆初识天之骄子肖珏丞磊饰后为摆脱家族命运毅然离开学馆奔赴沙场多年后何晏荣归故里却因兄长何如非白澍饰回归被家族设计何晏大难不死后转换身份化身城门校尉女儿禾晏女扮男装前往掖州投军立志拿回属于自己的一切禾晏结交了温润如玉的楚昭张康乐饰更是与肖珏再次重逢可肖珏怀疑禾晏是奸细处处针对反复试探禾晏死抱肖珏大腿并以掖州卫第一的成绩向肖珏证明了自己的能力.

programme.title: 红星大奖2025 - 颁奖典礼

programme.title: Ayalaan
programme.desc: Meet the M family! Mani, the wide-eyed father and Mages, his bossy wife, are aliens masquerading as humans on Earth, trying to comprehend and study human behavior. Their son, Maran, meets a group of lovable misfits at school while their rebellious daughter, Mangai, feels alienated being the only human in the family. Join this oddball family in Ayalaan - Out of this World on a whimsical journey of understanding the complex beings that are humans!

programme.title: Ethiroli S23
programme.desc: Motherhood may be a full-time responsibility, but for many women, it is not the end of ambition. So, what happens when mothers try to return to work — after maternity leave, after years away, or after putting family first? We examine the realities of re-entry, the barriers mothers still face, and the larger question Singapore must confront: are mothers truly being supported, or simply expected to adjust alone?

programme.title: Concorde: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Go inside the race to build the first supersonic airliner between Europe's Concorde, the Soviet TU144 and the American Boeing 2707. From the post-war jet boom to the death of the supersonic dream 40 years later, this is a story of engineering brilliance, international espionage and tragedy that surrounded the attempt to make the fastest airliner on earth. Also, could supersonic make a comeback?
